results.justification: EXACT TWIN — WaveletGPT signal-processing wavelet decomposition infused into LLM pretraining IS the STFT/wavelet K-band gradient decomposition mechanism.
Multiscale frequency subband with adaptive low+high-frequency updates overlaps with per-band selective damping mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — spectral-norm Jacobian + small sub-layers + large residual shortcut IS the plate-thickness layer-wise grad-norm budget + selective damping mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — per-parameter adaptive clipping + EMA gradient-norm + spike elimination IS the per-band selective damping + layer-wise budget mechanism.
Muon + activation-growth control + attention-layer mechanism overlaps with plate-thickness layer-wise grad-norm budget.
EXACT TWIN — gradient shaping + frequency-domain analysis + per-component damping IS the STFT K-band selective damping mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — Hessian layer-wise clipping + gradient annealing + per-layer norm budgeting IS the plate-thickness layer-wise budget + wood-seasoning warmup mechanism.
SPAM spike-aware Adam + momentum reset + spike-aware clipping overlaps with selective damping spike-suppression mechanism.
